title: Shadow 16x
description: A clean default-edit PVP Minigame texture pack that makes every play feel awesome
body:
🌑 Shadow 16x – Resource Pack Description

Shadow 16x is a clean PvP-focused pack built for clarity and performance, while keeping a smooth 16× style.

✨ Key Features:

16x resolution – lightweight and sharp visuals.

Short swords – more screen space during PvP.

Custom skies – immersive day & night views. (REQUIRES OPTIFINE MOD)

Optimized wool textures – designed for godbridging & bridging practice.

Special crosshair – precise alignment for bridging and combat.

_**Note: I do not have explicit permission for some textures used. I am fine with removing said textures if it is an obligation to the creators. Contact me via Discord @void2d, Instagram @void46_ , and e-mail : void.pvt@proton.me
**_
